title: Jamaican Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine with Jamaican spices, perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, cook until softened (5 minutes).
Add ground coriander, Jamaican seasoning, and tagine spice blend, stir (1 minute).
Add carrots and potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add dried apricots, stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer (30 minutes).
Season with spicy xtra, adjust to taste.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs (optional).
Note: Traditionally, tagines are cooked in clay pots with a conical lid. If using a saucepan, cover with a lid to trap steam.
Adjust cooking time and liquid as needed for your preferred consistency.
